title: Gotta Go Craft
description: A mod inspired by the Sonic the Hedgehog franchise.
body:
![GGCBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c01f957ed37a38671c263d8736f49b7aaf0dd5fc_0.webp)
In this mod we brought some features from the universe of the Sonic the Hedgehog franchise to Minecraft. Adding new mobs, items and even a new dimension to explore.

First, you must craft the new Enchanted Ring, surrounding a golden ring with more gold bars and nuggets. Use it to enter the new dimension where you can witness beautiful landscapes with structures and creatures from the popular Sonic game franchise.
You can collect new items that will help you on your journey, such as Sonic's Boots and even the famous Chaos Emeralds.

Disclaimer: This mod is not an official product of the SEGA company responsible for Sonic, just a mod made by fans who would like to implement some interesting and fun aspects of the franchise in Minecraft.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vsEULwC5jiI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
